tasks.label: killPort5173
tasks.command: for pid in /proc/[0-9]*/; do if [ -f "$pid/cmdline" ]; then cmd=$(tr '\0' ' ' < "$pid/cmdline"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q "node /workspaces/copilot-general/app/node_modules/.bin/vite"; then pid_num=$(basename $pid); kill -9 $pid_num 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi; done
